title: Barfussia laxissima
taxonomy: Barfussia laxissima is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This genus is a part of the family Annonaceae, a family of flowering plants native to Central and South America. The plant is native to Central and South America, and its classification as Barfussia laxissima makes it one of the lesser-known species within the Annonaceae family. Barfussia laxissima's classification is further categorized into the family Annonaceae, order Magnoliales, and clade Magnoliidae. The classification of Barfussia laxissima is specific and reflects its unique characteristics within the Annonaceae family.
